mapper.select: SELECT a.*, an.name AS animal_name, o.name AS owner_name, d.name AS doctor_name FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN animal an ON a.animal_id = an.id LEFT JOIN owner o ON an.owner_id = o.id LEFT JOIN doctor d ON a.doctor_id = d.id ORDER BY a.appointment_date ASC, a.appointment_time ASC

SELECT a.*, an.name AS animal_name, o.name AS owner_name, d.name AS doctor_name FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN animal an ON a.animal_id = an.id LEFT JOIN owner o ON an.owner_id = o.id LEFT JOIN doctor d ON a.doctor_id = d.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appointment (animal_id, doctor_id, appointment_date, appointment_time, reason, status, animal_name, species, owner_name) VALUES (#{animalId}, #{doctorId}, #{appointmentDate}, #{appointmentTime}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{animalName}, #{species}, #{ownerName})
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, an.name AS animal_name, o.name AS owner_name, d.name AS doctor_name FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN animal an ON a.animal_id = an.id LEFT JOIN owner o ON an.owner_id = o.id LEFT JOIN doctor d ON a.doctor_id = d.id ORDER BY a.appointment_date ASC, a.appointment_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
